verses.text: David' tapa Solomon in ama kumpi gam kho takin lenkip hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ama Pasian in ompih a, a lian mahmahin amah a bawl hi
Solomon in Israel mi khempeuh tung, a tultul leh a zaza-a a ukte tung, thukhente tung, Israel sunga makai khempeuh tung, leh beh lutangte tungah thu a gen hi

Tua ciangin Solomon leh amah tawh a om khempeuh, Gibeon-a a om mual dawna biakpiakna munah pai uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' nasem Moses in gamlakah a bawlsa Pasian' kikhopna buk tua lai-ah om hi

(Ahih hangin David in Kiriathjearim panin ama-a' dingin a bawlsaknasa munah Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang paipihto khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah in Jerusalem-ah ama-a' dingin puanbuk khat lamsak khin hi
Tua thamloin Hur' tapa Uri, a tapa Bezalel in a bawl sumngo biakna tau pen Topa' biakbuk mai tua lai-ah om hi. Tua ciangin Solomon leh a kikhawm mite in Topa thu dong uh hi
Tua ciangin kikhopna bukah a om Topa' mai-a sumngo biakna tau-ah Solomon paito-in tua tungah meihal biakna ganhing tul khat a pia hi
Tua zanin Solomon tungah Pasian kilangin ama kiangah, “Nang kong piak ding hong gen in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Solomon in Pasian kiangah, “Nangmah in ka pa David tungah a lian leh a kip itna na lak khin a, ama tangin kumpi-in keimah nong koih khin hi
Topa Pasian aw, leitung leivui zahin a tam mite tungah kumpi-in kei hong koih khin na hih manin ka pa David tungah na thuciamna tu-in hong tungsak in
Hih mite ka uk theihna dingin tu-in pilna leh theihna hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh hih zahin a tam hih na mite kua in ukzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Pasian in Solomon dawngin, “Hih thu na lungsim sungah om a, nangmah in neihsate, hauhna, pahtawina, ahih kei leh nang hong mudahte' nuntakna hong ngenloin, a tungah kumpi-in nang kong koihna ka mite na uk theihna dingin nang-a' ding pilna leh theihna hong ngen na hih manin

pilna leh theihna nangma tungah hong kipia hi. Nang' ma-a kumpite kuamah in a neih ngeiloh, nang' khit-ate kuamah in zong tua bang a neihloh ding hauhnate, neihnate, leh pahtawina zong, nangma tungah kong pia thuah ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gibeon-a om mual dawna biakpiakna mun, kikhopna buk mai panin Jerusalem-ah Solomon hong pai hi. Tua ciangin amah in Israel tungah a uk hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Sakolte leh Leengte tawh Solomon' Sumbawlna

verses.text: Solomon in leengte leh sakol tung tuangte kaikhawm hi. Amah in leeng tul khat leh za li leh sakol tung tuang mi tul sawm leh tul nih nei a, leeng khuapite sung leh Jerusalem-ah tuate a koih hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in Jerusalem-ah suang bangin ngun leh kham olsak a, taamtak singte pen Shefelah theithek sing bangin tamsak hi
Solomon in gamdang panin sakol a lakna munte pen Egypt leh Kue pan hi a, kumpipa' sumbawlte in a man ding pia-in Kue panin tuate ngah uh hi

Amaute in Egypt panin leeng khat ciangin ngun shekel za guk-in la uh a, sakol khat ciangin za leh sawmnga-in la uh hi. Tua bangmahin amaute in zuakkhiat kik dingin Hit kumpite leh Syria kumpite khempeuh tung panin zong sakol leh leeng a la uh hi.
